component.name: qBittorrent Plugin Downloader
component.summary: Selective installer for qBittorrent search plugins from allowlisted catalogs

description.p: Fetches allowlisted search-plugin catalogs (unofficial MediaWiki list, official qBittorrent nova3 engines, and LightDestory), merges duplicates by install filename, and lets you select plugins to install into the local nova3 engines directory.
Bundled with Python {{ python-fullversion }}, PySide6, and httpx.
